Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew M. Mkonu, in pro per, Tel. 415.269.1180, for defendant;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. The court orders the levying officer to withhold $125./pay period for payment to service the debt. The Court shall prepare the order and mail to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
